limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI spend, named vendor/cloud partnerships, or dedicated AI budget disclosed in the excerpts; only generic references to potential AI incorporation.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and contains detailed AI risk discussion; scored 4 because multiple company-specific risk mechanisms are described (regulatory compliance costs, model bias, third-party dependency, bad-actor exploitation), though no quantification or named governance body is disclosed in these excerpts.
